data.title: Grayscale submits revised S-1 for Dogecoin ETF as NYSE Arca seeks to modify firm’s Ethereum trusts
data.description:
Grayscale has filed an amended S-1 in its latest move to convert its closed-ended Dogecoin trust into an exchange-traded fund.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/371495/grayscale-submits-revised-s-1-for-dogecoin-etf-as-nyse-arca-seeks-to-modify-firms-ethereum-trusts?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: FTX Recovery Trust to unlock $1.6B for creditors in September disbursement
data.description:

data.title: US Treasury opens second round of comments on Genius Act implementation
data.description:
The bill to establish rules for payment stablecoins was signed into law by US President Donald Trump in July and awaits final regulations before implementation.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/united-states-treasury-public-comments-genius-stablecoins?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: X Exposes Massive Bribe Scandal to Restore Suspended Crypto Accounts
data.description:

source: https://cryptonews.com/news/x-exposes-massive-bribe-scandal-to-restore-suspended-crypto-accounts/

data.title: Bhutan Government Moves $107 Million In BTC As Whales Make Moves Following Fed’s Rate Cut
data.description:
The Royal Government of Bhutan moved over $100 million worth of Bitcoin (BTC) on Sept. 18, sparking concerns of potential sell pressure.
source: https://zycrypto.com/bhutan-government-moves-107-million-in-btc-as-whales-make-moves-following-feds-rate-cut/

data.description:

source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/cftc-digital-asset-markets-subcommittee-crypto-appointments?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

source: https://cryptoslate.com/ftx-creditors-set-to-receive-1-6b-in-third-distribution-round-on-sept-30/

data.title: Solana Bulls Eye $500 as Whales and Treasuries Load Up
data.description:
"Solana investors are setting their sights on a target price of $500, as prominent whales and large institutional treasuries take the opportunity to accumulate significant amounts of the cryptocurrency, signaling their confidence in its future growth and potential in the market."
source: https://blocknews.com/solana-bulls-eye-500-as-whales-and-treasuries-load-up/

data.title: The Faces Behind the Fortunes: 3 Youngest Billionaires in Crypto
data.description:
In just over a decade, crypto has gone from an emerging concept to a trillion-dollar force. At its center is a new class of billionaires who are rewriting the rules of wealth.   What makes them fascinating isn’t just the size of their wallets but the scale of their impact. These trailblazers have built empires valued in the tens of billions, from crypto platforms to blockchain networks, redefining what it means to get rich
source: https://beincrypto.com/youngest-crypto-billionaires-2025/

data.title: X Uncovers Bribery Ring Tied to Crypto Scam Accounts
data.description:
X exposes a bribery network tied to crypto scams. Banned users tried to pay staff for account reinstatement. Legal action and security tightening follow.
source: https://coincu.com/363238-x-uncovers-bribery-ring-tied-to-crypto

data.title: MetaMask’s Long-Rumored Token May Arrive ‘Sooner Than Expected’, CEO Says
data.description:
Consensys chief Joe Lubin has told reporters that MetaMask’s long-awaited native token, widely known as MASK, is “coming” and could appear sooner than many expect. Related Reading: FalconX Moves 413K Solana Worth $98M – Impact On SOL Price According to Lubin, the token will be tied to efforts to push parts of MetaMask toward greater decentralization. MetaMask Plans And Recent Moves MetaMask has not been idle while the token talk simmered. The wallet recently rolled out a native dollar stablecoin called MetaMask USD, or mUSD, which now plays across Ethereum and the Linea Layer-2 network
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/altcoin/metamasks-long-rumored-token-may-arrive-sooner-than-expected-ceo-says/

data.title: Dogecoin ETF Sees Strong Debut, But Rex-Osprey Is Already Plotting a Riskier DOJE Fund
data.description:
Rex-Osprey has filed for a riskier ETF that grants investors leveraged exposure to its existing Dogecoin fund, DOJE, which debuted Thursday.
source: https://decrypt.co/340510/dogecoin-etf-strong-debut-rex-osprey-already-plotting-riskier-doje-fund

data.title: US Treasury Department seeks public comment on applying GENIUS Act stablecoin rules
data.description:
